params.escrow: The full escrow data — its hash is used as the swap key.
params.substituteBurnKey: The burn key to associate with this swap.

returns.result: The keccak256 hash of the escrow data

returns.isValid: True if the preimage matches the claimData hash

params.escrow: The full escrow data — its hash is used as the swap key.

addBurnIfSwapCreated((address,address,ui.notice: (1) Checks the EscrowManager for an existing (committed) swap,         and if so registers the substituteBurnKey against the swap hash in the local mapping.

claimAndMintInRollup((address,address,ui.notice: Claim tokens from escrow, wrap native currency if needed, and mint in RollupV1

getERC20Balance(address).notice: Get the balance of an ERC20 token in this contract

getEscrowHash((address,address,uint256,a.notice: Get the escrow hash for a given escrow data (useful for tracking)

getNativeBalance().notice: Get the native currency balance of this contract

verifyPreimage((address,address,uint256,.notice: Verify that a preimage is valid for an escrow before attempting to claim

verifySwapAndBurn((address,address,uint2.notice: (2) Checks the EscrowManager that the swap has been claimed,         and verifies a corresponding entry exists in the local mapping.

withdrawERC20(address,uint256,address).notice: Withdraw ERC20 tokens from this contract

withdrawNative(uint256,address).notice: Withdraw native currency (ETH/CtBTC) from this contract
